description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named NestedText that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.8, 3.x) in parallel. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, display the Python version, install required packages (pip, tox, coveralls, and the current package), run tests with tox, and report test coverage to Coveralls.
